emails.subject: Still searching for answers, [FIRST_NAME]?
emails.preview: What most clinics miss about your health
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you have been dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] for a while now, you already know the frustration of getting a quick appointment, a standard test, and a prescription that only manages — but never resolves — what you are feeling.

At Atma Clinic, we take a different approach.

Our team of medical, nutrition, and mental health specialists works together to look at you as a whole person — physically, mentally, and in some cases spiritually. We do not rush. We do not guess. We run advanced testing that most conventional practices do not offer, and we build a plan specifically around your biology, your history, and your goals.

We have two Kansas locations — Lawrence and Overland Park — and we are taking new patients now.

If you are ready to find real answers instead of just another prescription, we would love to meet you.

Warm regards,
The Atma Clinic Team
Lawrence: 785-760-0695 | Overland Park: 913-568-0608

emails.subject: Why your symptoms keep coming back, [FIRST_NAME]
emails.preview: The loop most doctors never break
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here is something that may sound familiar.

You see a doctor. They run standard labs. Everything looks 'normal.' But you still feel off — tired, foggy, in pain, or just not like yourself. So you try another specialist. Same story.

This happens because conventional medicine is designed to identify and treat disease, not optimize health or find the underlying drivers behind symptoms that have not yet crossed a diagnostic threshold.

Functional and integrative medicine starts from a different question: what is actually causing this? That could be gut microbiome imbalance, nutritional deficiencies, genetic factors, chronic inflammation, hormonal shifts, or something environmental. Often it is a combination.

At Atma Clinic, we use advanced testing — cellular nutrition analysis, gut biome assessment, genetic markers, and more — to build a complete picture. Then we address what we find, not just what the standard checklist allows for.

When you treat the real cause, you stop the cycle.

If you are curious what that process would look like for you, we are here to talk.

The Atma Clinic Team

emails.subject: What changed for one of our Lawrence patients
emails.preview: From dismissed to finally having answers
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

We want to share a story from one of our patients — shared with permission and details changed to protect privacy.

A patient in their late 40s came to us after years of fatigue, brain fog, and recurring pain that multiple specialists had not been able to explain. Standard labs were always 'fine.' They had nearly given up on finding answers.

After joining Atma Clinic, we ran a full functional workup — including gut microbiome analysis, cellular nutrition testing, and inflammatory markers. What we found was a pattern of nutrient depletion, gut imbalance, and low-grade systemic inflammation. None of these had been identified before.

Over the following months, with a personalized nutrition and supplementation plan combined with targeted medical support, this patient reported significantly improved energy, clarity, and day-to-day function.

Results vary. Every patient is different, and we cannot promise specific outcomes. What we can promise is that we will take the time to truly look.

If you are ready for that kind of care, we have appointments available at both our Lawrence and Overland Park offices.

The Atma Clinic Team

*Individual results vary. This is not a guarantee of specific outcomes.*

gamma_content.digital_health_report:
🔎 DIGITAL SEO HEALTH REPORT — atmaclinic.com
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 DOMAIN SNAPSHOT
──────────────────
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Global Rank | 1,863,238 |
| Keywords Ranked | 258 |
| Monthly Traffic | 398 |
| Traffic Value | $119 |
| Keywords in Top 10 | 15 |
| SERP Features Traffic | 0 |

🔑 THE CORE FINDING: INVISIBLE WHERE IT COUNTS MOST
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
258 keywords ranked, yet only 398 monthly visitors — a traffic-to-keyword ratio that signals the practice is ranking mostly for low-volume branded and tangential terms rather than the high-intent local searches that convert. Position breakdown:

- Position 1–3: 4 keywords
- Position 4–10: 11 keywords
- Position 11–20: 20 keywords
- Positions 21+: 223 keywords

Nearly 87% of all ranked keywords sit below page one — earning clicks only for brand name searches while the local community searching for functional medicine and integrative care never finds Atma Clinic.

🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
16 SERPs related to Atma Clinic's topic space now trigger an AI Overview. Atma Clinic is cited in 0 of them. Every AI-generated answer box displacing a traditional result is an impression the practice loses entirely — and that gap is only widening as AI Overviews expand.

🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: LOCAL FUNCTIONAL & INTEGRATIVE MEDICINE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
The practice has no meaningful ranking for the highest-intent queries patients use when actively looking for care. Target cluster:

- 'functional medicine lawrence ks' [not ranked]
- 'integrative medicine kansas city' [not ranked]
- 'holistic doctor lawrence ks' [not ranked]
- 'natural medical care lawrence' [pos 12, vol 110]
- 'dr lawrence ks' [pos 20, vol 140]
- 'functional medicine overland park' [not ranked]
- 'holistic primary care kansas' [not ranked]

These are the terms prospects type when they already know they want this type of care — capturing even a fraction converts directly to booked appointments.

⚡ WITHIN STRIKING DISTANCE (pos 4–10)
──────────────────────────────────────
- 'atma health' — pos 5, vol 140
- 'healthshare zion' — pos 8, vol 70
- 'niacin sauna' — pos 7, vol 50
- 'sauna and niacin' — pos 8, vol 50
- 'niacin and sauna' — pos 8, vol 50
- 'glutathione before sauna' — pos 2, vol 90

→ Highest priority: 'atma health' at position 5 with 140 monthly searches — a single content or technical push could land this in the top 3 and capture branded-adjacent traffic immediately.

🏆 VS YOUR TOP COMPETITOR
──────────────────────────
| Metric | atmaclinic.com | phclinic.com.au |
|--------|----------------|------------------|
| Keywords Ranked | 258 | 1,002 |
| Monthly Traffic | 398 | 221 |
| Traffic Value | $119 | $63 |
| Global Rank | 1,863,238 | — |

phclinic.com.au ranks for nearly 4x the keywords despite being an Australian clinic with no local relevance to Kansas — a direct signal that Atma's content library is severely underdeveloped for its category.

🎯 3-PRIORITY ATTACK PLAN
──────────────────────────
1. LOCAL SERVICE PAGES — Build dedicated, optimized pages for 'functional medicine Lawrence KS,' 'holistic primary care Overland Park,' and 'integrative medicine Kansas City.' Each page targets specific search intent; estimated impact: first page rankings within 60–90 days for low-competition local terms.

2. CONTENT AUTHORITY BRIDGE — Atma ranks position 2 for 'glutathione before sauna' (90 searches/month) and holds positions 7–8 for niacin/sauna queries. Expand these into a full IV nutrition and detox content cluster (6–8 articles) to capture the informational-to-booking funnel and build topical authority in a niche Atma clearly owns.

3. AI OVERVIEW CITATIONS — With 16 AI Overview SERPs triggered and 0 citations, publishing structured FAQ content on Alzheimer's/Bredesen Protocol, histamine intolerance, and Lyme disease (all topics the site already touches) gives AI models structured content to cite — closing the gap before competitors claim those placements.
